overview: Abomination is a SubBoss-class Demon/Aberration monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 900 HP, 30 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 5 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Greedy Rush at 200% ratio (600 base damage). Sight range 1100, combat radius 200.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Heavy Swing Up (150%), Heavy Swing Down (150%).

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 1 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Greedy Rush (200%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Vomiting Blinker
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Vomiting Blinker icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Dark, Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Dark (+500), Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Greedy Rush (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Greedy Rush deals 600 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1100 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1100 units, loses target at 1600 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 200, ability check distance 300
strategies.description: Combat area radius 200. Ability check distance 300. Ability attack delay: 0.3s.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1100 units. Loses target at 1600 units.
